subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Today we will speak about Obedience! The Manifestation of God is a perfect example... Real obedience and real sacrifice are identical - absolute readiness to follow and
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
